projectDescription: An AI-powered web-based code editor with a built-in AI assistant, inline autocomplete, file explorer, project management, and multi-language template support.
keyFeatures: Monaco-based code editor with syntax highlighting for multiple languages
AI assistant with streaming responses in Agent and Ask modes
AI inline code autocomplete triggered while typing
File explorer with full CRUD: create, rename, delete files and folders
Project management dashboard with recent and all-projects views
Diff viewer to preview and accept/reject AI-suggested code changes
30+ language and framework templates to jumpstart projects
Customizable editor themes (50+ themes including Dracula, Nord, Monokai, Night Owl)
User authentication with session management and token refresh
Subscription billing via Paystack with free and paid plans
